---
name: Skill Request
about: Suggest a new skill or a major improvement to an existing one
title: "[SKILL] short description"
labels: enhancement
---

## Skill name

What would you call this skill? (kebab-case)

## What problem does it solve?

Who would use this and when would they reach for it?

## Proposed slash command

`/skill-name [args]`

## Rough workflow

Describe the steps the skill would take at a high level.

## Inputs / Outputs

- **Inputs:** What would the user provide?
- **Outputs:** What files or content would the skill generate?

## References or examples

Any existing frameworks, templates, or real-world examples this skill should follow?
